FROM (

        SELECT
            STR_TO_MILLIS(d.order_purchase_timestamp) AS ts,
            DATE_DIFF_STR(d.order_purchase_timestamp, "2017-01-01", "day") AS t,
            oi.price AS sales_value
        FROM `E_commerce`.`E_commerce_scope`.`orders` AS d
        JOIN `E_commerce`.`E_commerce_scope`.`order_items` AS oi
            ON d.order_id = oi.order_id
        WHERE d.order_purchase_timestamp BETWEEN "2017-01-01" AND "2018-08-29 23:59:59"
    ),
    reg AS (
        SELECT
            SUM(t) AS sum_t,
            SUM(t * t) AS sum_t2,
            SUM(sales_value) AS sum_y,
            SUM(t * sales_value) AS sum_ty,
            COUNT(*) AS n
        FROM sales
    ),
    coeffs AS (
        SELECT
            (sum_ty - (sum_t * sum_y) / n) / (sum_t2 - (sum_t * sum_t) / n) AS b,
            (sum_y / n) - ((sum_ty - (sum_t * sum_y) / n) / (sum_t2 - (sum_t * sum_t) / n)) * (sum_t / n) AS a
        FROM reg
    ),
    preds AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_ADD_STR("2018-12-05", idx, "day") AS pred_date,
            DATE_DIFF_STR(DATE_ADD_STR("2018-12-05", idx, "day"), "2017-01-01", "day") AS t_pred
        FROM (
            SELECT 0 AS idx UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3
        ) AS i
    ),
    daily_pred AS (
        SELECT
            p.pred_date,
            p.t_pred,
            (c.a + c.b * p.t_pred) AS predicted_sales
        FROM preds AS p
        JOIN coeffs AS c ON TRUE
    ),
    window_days AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            dp.pred_date,
            DATE_ADD_STR(dp.pred_date, off, "day") AS win_date,
            DATE_DIFF_STR(DATE_ADD_STR(dp.pred_date, off, "day"), "2017-01-01", "day") AS t_win
        FROM daily_pred AS dp
        JOIN (
            SELECT -2 AS off UNION ALL SELECT -1 UNION ALL SELECT 0 UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2
        ) AS o
    ),
    window_pred AS (
        SELECT
            wd.pred_date,
            (c.a + c.b * wd.t_win) AS win_predicted_sales
        FROM window_days AS wd
        JOIN coeffs AS c ON TRUE
    )
    SELECT
        pred_date,
        AVG(win_predicted_sales) AS moving_avg
    FROM window_pred
    GROUP BY pred_date
) AS ma;', 'parameters': '{"client_context_id":"869348-835f-fc4b-d00b-99de4ab23c4372","metrics":false,"query_context":"`e_commerce`.e_commerce_scope","statement":"SELECT SUM(moving_avg) AS sum_5day_moving_avgs\nFROM (\n    WITH sales AS (\n        SELECT\n            STR_TO_MILLIS(d.order_purchase_timestamp) AS ts,\n            DATE_DIFF_STR(d.order_purchase_timestamp, \"2017-01-01\", \"day\") AS t,\n            oi.price AS sales_value\n        FROM `E_commerce`.`E_commerce_scope`.`orders` AS d\n        JOIN `E_commerce`.`E_commerce_scope`.`order_items` AS oi\n            ON d.order_id = oi.order_id\n        WHERE d.order_purchase_timestamp BETWEEN \"2017-01-01\" AND \"2018-08-29 23:59:59\"\n    ),\n    reg AS (\n        SELECT\n            SUM(t) AS sum_t,\n            SUM(t * t) AS sum_t2,\n            SUM(sales_value) AS sum_y,\n            SUM(t * sales_value) AS sum_ty,\n            COUNT(*) AS n\n        FROM sales\n    ),\n    coeffs AS (\n        SELECT\n            (sum_ty - query:
SELECT SUM(moving_avg) AS sum_5day_moving_avgs
FROM (
    WITH sales AS (
        SELECT
            STR_TO_MILLIS(d.order_purchase_timestamp) AS ts,
            DATE_DIFF_STR(d.order_purchase_timestamp, "2017-01-01", "day") AS t,
            oi.price AS sales_value
        FROM `E_commerce`.`E_commerce_scope`.`orders` AS d
        JOIN `E_commerce`.`E_commerce_scope`.`order_items` AS oi
            ON d.order_id = oi.order_id
        WHERE d.order_purchase_timestamp BETWEEN "2017-01-01" AND "2018-08-29 23:59:59"
    ),
    reg AS (
        SELECT
            SUM(t) AS sum_t,
            SUM(t * t) AS sum_t2,
            SUM(sales_value) AS sum_y,
            SUM(t * sales_value) AS sum_ty,
            COUNT(*) AS n
        FROM sales
    ),
    coeffs AS (
        SELECT
            (sum_ty - (sum_t * sum_y) / n) / (sum_t2 - (sum_t * sum_t) / n) AS b,
            (sum_y / n) - ((sum_ty - (sum_t * sum_y) / n) / (sum_t2 - (sum_t * sum_t) / n)) * (sum_t / n) AS a
        FROM reg
    ),
    preds AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_ADD_STR("2018-12-05", idx, "day") AS pred_date,
            DATE_DIFF_STR(DATE_ADD_STR("2018-12-05", idx, "day"), "2017-01-01", "day") AS t_pred
        FROM (
            SELECT 0 AS idx UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3
        ) AS i
    ),
    daily_pred AS (
        SELECT
            p.pred_date,
            p.t_pred,
            (c.a + c.b * p.t_pred) AS predicted_sales
        FROM preds AS p
        JOIN coeffs AS c ON TRUE
    ),
    window_days AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            dp.pred_date,
            DATE_ADD_STR(dp.pred_date, off, "day") AS win_date,
            DATE_DIFF_STR(DATE_ADD_STR(dp.pred_date, off, "day"), "2017-01-01", "day") AS t_win
        FROM daily_pred AS dp
        JOIN (
            SELECT -2 AS off UNION ALL SELECT -1 UNION ALL SELECT 0 UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2
        ) AS o
    ),
    window_pred AS (
        SELECT
            wd.pred_date,
            (c.a + c.b * wd.t_win) AS win_predicted_sales
        FROM window_days AS wd
        JOIN coeffs AS c ON TRUE
    )
    SELECT
        pred_date,
        AVG(win_predicted_sales) AS moving_avg
    FROM window_pred
    GROUP BY pred_date
) AS ma;

(sum_t * sum_y) / n) / (sum_t2 - (sum_t * sum_t) / n) AS b,\n            (sum_y / n) - ((sum_ty - (sum_t * sum_y) / n) / (sum_t2 - (sum_t * sum_t) / n)) * (sum_t / n) AS a\n        FROM reg\n    ),\n    preds AS (\n        SELECT\n            DATE_ADD_STR(\"2018-12-05\", idx, \"day\") AS pred_date,\n            DATE_DIFF_STR(DATE_ADD_STR(\"2018-12-05\", idx, \"day\"), \"2017-01-01\", \"day\") AS t_pred\n        FROM (\n            SELECT 0 AS idx UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3\n        ) AS i\n    ),\n    daily_pred AS (\n        SELECT\n            p.pred_date,\n            p.t_pred,\n            (c.a + c.b * p.t_pred) AS predicted_sales\n        FROM preds AS p\n        JOIN coeffs AS c ON TRUE\n    ),\n    window_days AS (\n        SELECT DISTINCT\n            dp.pred_date,\n            DATE_ADD_STR(dp.pred_date, off, \"day\") AS win_date,\n            DATE_DIFF_STR(DATE_ADD_STR(dp.pred_date, off, \"day\"), \"2017-01-01\", \"day\") AS t_win\n        FROM daily_pred AS dp\n        JOIN (\n            SELECT -2 AS off UNION ALL SELECT -1 UNION ALL SELECT 0 UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2\n        ) AS o\n    ),\n    window_pred AS (\n        SELECT\n            wd.pred_date,\n            (c.a + c.b * wd.t_win) AS win_predicted_sales\n        FROM window_days AS wd\n        JOIN coeffs AS c ON TRUE\n    )\n    SELECT\n        pred_date,\n        AVG(win_predicted_sales) AS moving_avg\n    FROM window_pred\n    GROUP BY pred_date\n) AS ma;","timeout":"1199500ms"}', 'context_type': 'QueryErrorContext'}), C Source=/private/var/folders/f2/r3dgq8r96vng03k_pvywgbwr0000gp/T/pip-install-lmb70lpo/couchbase_fd8119e8c23d4f3a8df07e355d0422eb/src/n1ql.cxx:279>)
